hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(bun\.lock|routeTree\.gen\.ts|node_modules/)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated files' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); out=$("$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/biome" check --write "$f" 2>&1); ec=$?; if [ $ec -ne 0 ] && ! echo "$out" | grep -q 'No files were processed'; then echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then bun run "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/check-deprecated-imports.ts" "$f" >&2 || exit 2; fi
